page_content:
ELECT UL

6 credits of approved upper level CHEM/BCHM courses

6

Total Credits

65

In order to meet requirements for a degree approved by the American Chemical Society (ACS), students must complete a speciﬁc set of courses in addition to this curriculum. Information about ACS certiﬁcation can be obtained in the undergraduate ofﬁce.

Requirements for the Bachelor of Arts in Chemistry (B.A.) All required chemistry courses must be passed with a minimum grade of "C-". Required supporting courses, must be passed with a 2.0 grade point average.
